Controls.Caption: Primary / Supporting Documentation
Controls.Tooltip: Supporting documentation will not create tasks in EPC and is meant to support the primary documentation with supplementary information.

Controls.Caption: This versioning type option will always link to the latest version of the document  in EPC.
This versioning type option will always link to the latest published version of the document in EPC.
This versioning type option will link to all relevant versions of the document—from the one currently in progress to the one next published.
This versioning type option will link only to the specified version of the document in EPC.
